spec.objective: Thread the per-level vendor default through cmd/manager/env.go and the Helm chart. Add resolveDefaultVendor() helper (reads TIDE_DEFAULT_VENDOR env var, fallback 'anthropic') and extend tideHelmProviderDefaults to populate ProviderDefaults.Vendor. Extend cmd/manager/env_test.go with a round-trip test: TIDE_DEFAULT_VENDOR=openai -> ProviderDefaults.Vendor=='openai'. Add subagent.defaults.vendor (and optional per-level vendor keys under subagent.levels.*) to charts/tide/values.yaml; wire TIDE_DEFAULT_VENDOR into charts/tide/templates/deployment.yaml. Verify helm template renders the env under both default and --set override paths. make verify-import-firewall and make verify-dispatch-imports must remain green -- zero openai or codex imports in controller or cmd/manager.
